len(q), type(q[0]), list(q[0].keys())[:20]

# prepare normalization functions and search

import unicodedata
import regex as re

def normalize_ar(text):
    # normalize whitespace
    t = text.strip()
    # convert to NFKC maybe
    t = unicodedata.normalize("NFKC", t)
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics)
    # Arabic diacritics unicode range \u0610-\u061A \u064B-\u065F \u06D6-\u06ED
    t = re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u0656\u0657\u0658]', '', t)
    # remove tatweel
    t = t.replace('\u0640','')
    # unify hamza variants: convert أ إ آ ء ئ ؤ etc to simple ا or maybe to ا`? We'll map to ا
    t = t.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # remove mad letter? Already converted
    # remove punctuations and non-Arabic letters and numbers maybe keep Arabic letters and spaces
    # Keep Arabic letters and spaces and Arabic-Indic digits maybe remove digits.
    t = re.sub(r'[^\p{Arabic}\s]', '', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', t)
    t = t.strip().lower()
    return t

def lcs_length(a,b):
    # dynamic programming lcs
    la=len(a); lb=len(b)
    dp = [[0]*(lb+1) for _ in range(la+1)]
    for i in range(la-1,-1,-1):
        for j in range(lb-1,-1,-1):
            if a[i]==b[j]:
                dp[i][j] = 1 + dp[i+1][j+1]
            else:
                dp[i][j] = max(dp[i+1][j], dp[i][j+1])
    return dp[0][0]

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta); cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if common==0: return 0.0
    precision = common / sum(ca.values())
    recall = common / sum(cb.values())
    if precision+recall==0: return 0.0
    return 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)

# load quranic ayats
with open("/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    q = json.load(f)

query_full = "ولنبلونكم بشيء مما كسبتم وليمحص ما في قلوبكم"
query_snippet = "ولنبلونكم ... في قلوبكم"
print("normalized query full:", normalize_ar(query_full))
print("normalized query snippet:", normalize_ar(query_snippet))

candidates = []
for entry in q:
    ay = entry['ayah_text']
    n_ay = normalize_ar(ay)
    for qtxt,label in [(query_full,'full'),(query_snippet,'snippet')]:
        n_q = normalize_ar(qtxt)
        # compute lcs ratio
        lcs = lcs_length(n_ay, n_q)
        lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(n_ay), len(n_q)) if max(len(n_ay), len(n_q))>0 else 0
        f1 = token_f1(n_ay, n_q)
        # also check substring presence
        substr = n_q in n_ay
        candidates.append((entry, label, lcs_ratio, f1, substr))
# sort by best lcs_ratio and f1
candidates_sorted = sorted(candidates, key=lambda x:(-x[2], -x[3]))
# show top 20 unique ayah_texts with scores
seen=set()
out=[]
for ent,label,lcsr,f1,substr in candidates_sorted[:60]:
    text=ent['ayah_text']
    if text in seen: continue
    seen.add(text)
    out.append((text, ent['surah_name'], ent['surah_id'], ent['ayah_id'], label, lcsr, f1, substr))
len(out), out[:20]

# search for occurrences of the normalized token "لنبلون"
target = normalize_ar("ولنبلون")
matches = []
for entry in q:
    n = normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text'])
    if 'لنبلون' in n:
        matches.append(entry)
len(matches), matches[:10]

# search for 'مما كسبتم' normalized
nt = normalize_ar("مما كسبتم")
matches=[]
for entry in q:
    if normalize_ar("مماكسبتم") in normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text']).replace(" ",""): # just check contiguously
        matches.append(entry)
len(matches), matches[:5]

queries = [query_full, query_snippet]
cands = [cand_2_155, cand_3_154, cand_47_31]
for c in cands:
    print("Candidate:", c['surah_name'], c['surah_id'], c['ayah_id'])
    for qtxt in queries:
        n_c = normalize_ar(c['ayah_text'])
        n_q = normalize_ar(qtxt)
        lcs = lcs_length(n_c, n_q)
        lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(n_c), len(n_q)) if max(len(n_c), len(n_q))>0 else 0
        f1 = token_f1(n_c, n_q)
        substr = n_q in n_c
        print(" q:", qtxt, "normalized:", n_q)
        print("  lcs_ratio:", lcs_ratio, "token_f1:", f1, "substring:", substr)
    print()

cand_concat = cand_2_155['ayah_text'] + " " + cand_3_154['ayah_text']
n_concat = normalize_ar(cand_concat)
n_query_full = normalize_ar(query_full)
lcs = lcs_length(n_concat, n_query_full)
lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(n_concat), len(n_query_full))
f1 = token_f1(n_concat, n_query_full)
len(n_concat), len(n_query_full), lcs_ratio, f1, n_concat[:200]

with open("/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
    had = json.load(f)
len(had), type(had[0]), list(had[0].keys())[:50]

# compute best matches across quranic verses
best_q = []
for entry in q:
    n_ay = normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text'])
    n_q = normalize_ar(query_full)
    lcs = lcs_length(n_ay, n_q)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(n_ay), len(n_q)) if max(len(n_ay), len(n_q))>0 else 0
    f1 = token_f1(n_ay, n_q)
    best_q.append((lcs_ratio, f1, entry))
best_q_sorted = sorted(best_q, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))
best_q_sorted[:10]

# compute best matches across hadiths (use Matn if present else hadithTxt)
best_h = []
for entry in had:
    text = entry.get('Matn') or entry.get('hadithTxt') or ""
    if not text: 
        continue
    n_text = normalize_ar(text)
    n_q = normalize_ar(query_full)
    lcs = lcs_length(n_text, n_q)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(n_text), len(n_q)) if max(len(n_text), len(n_q))>0 else 0
    f1 = token_f1(n_text, n_q)
    best_h.append((lcs_ratio, f1, entry['hadithID'], entry.get('BookID'), text[:100]))
best_h_sorted = sorted(best_h, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))
best_h_sorted[:20]
